subcodes.first_line: O thou my dear respected friend! Thy letter was received. As it evinced love, faithfulness, and loyalty in the established relations between hearts
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای دوست عزیز محترم نامه شما رسید مضمون چون دلیل محبت و وفا و ثبوت در روابط قلبیه
subcodes.subjects: @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution, @education of children; moral education
